meta.positioning: The autonomous AI agent operating system for solopreneurs — persistent agents that research, post, earn, and report while you sleep.

pricing.pro: $49/mo — Unlimited agents, revenue tools, Stripe, Bluesky, email

differentiators: Persistent agents that survive restarts (not one-shot prompts)
Visual office-floor dashboard showing live agent activity
Real revenue tools built-in (Stripe, Bluesky, email)
Fully local, no cloud dependency, Mac-native

bluesky_posts.post_text:
AI HQ is live.

A self-hosted agent OS for solopreneurs — 25+ persistent AI agents that run your business while you sleep.

Research. Marketing. Revenue tracking. Stripe payments. Social posting. All autonomous. All local.

Free tier available. Pro at $49/mo.

#AIAgents #IndieHacker #SaaS
bluesky_posts.notes: Lead with the announcement. Establish what it is. Include pricing to filter for serious interest.

bluesky_posts.post_text:
What if your agents didn't forget everything between sessions?

AI HQ agents are persistent. They survive restarts, maintain state, and pick up where they left off.

Plus: live dashboard, Stripe integration, autonomous social posting, self-healing architecture.

This isn't a chatbot. It's an operating system.

#AI #Automation
bluesky_posts.notes: Persistence is the key differentiator vs AutoGPT/CrewAI. Lead with the pain point.

bluesky_posts.post_text:
AI HQ pricing:

Free — Core runtime + dashboard + 3 agents
Pro $49/mo — Unlimited agents, Stripe, Bluesky, email tools
Lifetime $299 — Everything. Forever. No subscription.

No cloud lock-in. Runs on your Mac. You own the whole stack.

Early adopters get Lifetime before it's gone.

#BuildInPublic #SoloFounder
bluesky_posts.notes: Clear pricing breakdown. Lifetime tier creates urgency. Emphasize ownership.

bluesky_posts.post_text:
Built AI HQ to run my own business. Now it runs 25+ agents autonomously:

→ GrowthAgent posts marketing every 30 min
→ RevenueTracker monitors MRR in real-time
→ Researcher scouts competitors daily
→ SpiritGuide directs the entire mission

Dogfooded for months. Now it's yours.

#AI #Startup
bluesky_posts.notes: Founder story + dogfooding credibility. Name specific agents to make it concrete.

bluesky_posts.post_text:
Lifetime Pro access to AI HQ: $299.

That's less than 6 months of Pro — then it's free forever.

25+ autonomous agents. Revenue tools. Live dashboard. Fully local.

This price won't last. First 100 Lifetime seats, then it's gone.

Grab it now before we close the window.

#IndieHacker #AI #Launch
bluesky_posts.notes: Scarcity play on Lifetime tier. Math comparison makes the value obvious.

email_welcome_sequence.subject: Welcome to AI HQ — your agents are ready
email_welcome_sequence.preview_text: Your autonomous agent operating system is waiting.
email_welcome_sequence.body_html:
Welcome to AI HQ

You just took the first step toward running your business on autopilot.

AI HQ is an autonomous agent operating system — 25+ specialized AI agents that research, post, earn, and report while you focus on what matters.

Get started in 3 steps:

  1. Download AI HQ — Mac native app or Docker. Drag, drop, launch.
  2. Open the Dashboard — See your agent fleet on the live office-floor view.
  3. Activate your first agent — Start with Researcher or GrowthAgent and watch them work.

Your agents are persistent — they survive restarts, maintain state, and pick up where they left off. No more one-shot prompts that forget everything.

Need help? Reply to this email or check the docs. We're building this for people exactly like you.

— The AI HQ Team

email_welcome_sequence.notes: Warm welcome. Reduce friction with 3 clear steps. Emphasize persistence as the 'aha' moment.

email_welcome_sequence.subject: The 5 agents that replace your first 3 hires
email_welcome_sequence.preview_text: Researcher, GrowthAgent, RevenueTracker, Reforger, SpiritGuide — meet your team.
email_welcome_sequence.body_html:
Your Agent Fleet: A Quick Tour

Most solopreneurs need to hire a researcher, a marketer, and a bookkeeper before they can grow. AI HQ gives you all three — plus an engineer and a strategist — on day one.

Meet the key agents:

  • Researcher — Scouts competitors, synthesizes market intel, surfaces opportunities. Runs daily.
  • GrowthAgent — Autonomous marketing engine. Posts to Bluesky every 30 minutes with live metrics baked in.
  • RevenueTracker — Monitors MRR, ARR, subscriptions, and churn in real-time via Stripe.
  • Reforger — Self-repair engineer. Fixes bugs, upgrades agents, and patches code without you lifting a finger.
  • SpiritGuide — Your mission director. Assesses system health, directs strategy, and ensures the fleet stays aligned.

The dashboard shows all of this in a live office-floor view — every agent's status, task, and output at a glance.

Pro tip: Connect your Stripe account to unlock RevenueTracker and start seeing live revenue data on the dashboard.

— The AI HQ Team

email_welcome_sequence.subject: Free is great. Pro is where the revenue starts.
email_welcome_sequence.preview_text: Unlock Stripe, unlimited agents, and the tools that actually make money.
email_welcome_sequence.body_html:
You've seen the agents. Now let them earn.

The free tier gives you the runtime, the dashboard, and 3 agents. That's enough to see what AI HQ can do.

But the revenue tools — Stripe payments, Bluesky marketing, email campaigns, unlimited agents — that's where solopreneurs start seeing real ROI.

What Pro unlocks:

  • Unlimited agents — Scale your fleet as your business grows
  • Stripe integration — Accept payments, track MRR, monitor churn automatically
  • Bluesky + Email — Autonomous social posting and email campaigns
  • SpiritGuide — Autonomous mission director that runs strategy while you sleep
  • Priority updates — First access to new agents and features

The math:

Pro is $49/mo. If your agents generate even one sale, one lead, or save you one hour of research per week — it pays for itself.

Or go Lifetime at $299 — less than 6 months of Pro, then it's free forever. First 100 seats only.

Upgrade to Pro →

— The AI HQ Team

show_hn.title: Show HN: AI HQ – An autonomous agent OS for solopreneurs (Mac, self-hosted, open source)
show_hn.body:
Hey HN,

I built AI HQ because I was tired of AI tools that forget everything the moment you close the tab.

AI HQ is a self-hosted autonomous agent operating system that runs on your Mac. It ships with 25+ specialized agents — CEO, Researcher, GrowthAgent, RevenueTracker, Reforger, and more — organized in a hierarchy that mirrors a real company.

What makes it different:

- **Persistent agents**: They survive restarts, maintain state, and pick up where they left off. No more re-prompting.
- **Live dashboard**: An office-floor view showing every agent's status, task, and output in real-time via SSE.
- **Revenue tools built-in**: Stripe payments, Bluesky social posting, SendGrid email — agents don't just plan, they execute and earn.
- **Fully local**: Runs on your machine. No cloud dependency. No telemetry. You own the whole stack.
- **Self-healing**: The Reforger agent patches bugs and upgrades other agents autonomously.

The architecture is a single Python HTTP server on port 5050 with agents running as daemon threads. Communication happens via task strings on a status bus. Persistence is file-based JSON — no database dependency, fully inspectable.

I've been dogfooding this to run my own business: the GrowthAgent posts marketing to Bluesky every 30 minutes, the Researcher scouts competitors daily, and the RevenueTracker monitors Stripe in real-time. SpiritGuide sits above everything as an autonomous mission director.

Free tier: core runtime + dashboard + 3 agents.
Pro ($49/mo): unlimited agents + revenue tools.
Lifetime ($299): everything, forever.

GitHub: {{github_url}}
Site: {{site_url}}

Would love feedback from the HN community. The codebase is open — PRs and issues welcome.
show_hn.notes: HN audience values: technical depth, honesty, open source, no hype. Lead with the problem (AI amnesia), show the architecture, include pricing transparently. Bolded key features for scannability. Invite feedback to drive engagement.

market_positioning.one_liner: The operating system for a one-person company.

competitor_comparison.vs_autogpt: AutoGPT runs one-shot tasks. AI HQ runs a persistent business with 25+ agents, revenue tools, and a live dashboard.
competitor_comparison.vs_crewai: CrewAI orchestrates agent crews for tasks. AI HQ orchestrates agent fleets for businesses — with Stripe, Bluesky, and a visual office floor.
competitor_comparison.vs_agentgpt: AgentGPT is a browser toy. AI HQ is a self-hosted OS with treasury, vault, policy engine, and real payment processing.

market_positioning.positioning_statement: For solopreneurs and indie hackers who want to run a business — not just automate tasks — AI HQ is the first autonomous agent OS that ships with revenue tools, persistent agents, and a live command dashboard. Unlike AutoGPT or CrewAI, AI HQ is designed to earn, not just execute.
